completed_this_session.name: loadForDeck skips primary/partner wipe on same-deck revisit — fixes stuck-at-idle card-search on back-to-decks → re-open flow
CardSearchSection lastFiredSearchKeyRef dedupes StrictMode double-invoke — halves /cards/search on revisit (mirror of DUP-4 CommanderSearch fix)

remaining_followups.name: Cache-first commander hydration in loadForDeck — zero Scryfall calls on return visits; requires storing oracle_id alongside print id on deck row (card-cache keys on oracle_id)
Pre-existing Tailwind canonical-class lint warnings in CommanderPanel.tsx:22, :43

Bookkeeping: 02-06-PLAN.md has no SUMMARY and ROADMAP.md:57 shows it unchecked, but deliverables (CardSearchSection.tsx, CardResultCell.tsx, e2e/specs/07-card-search.spec.ts) all exist — landed across 02.3 plans. Retroactive SUMMARY OR mark superseded + tick ROADMAP

00-smoke and 07-card-search fail when 'Persistent storage not granted by browser' vite warning reaches the console gate — environmental/flaky, not test logic. Consider consoleGate allowlist or suppress the warning in test env

decisions.decision: Only wipe primaryCommander/partnerCommander when loadedDeckId !== incoming deckId; keep them on same-deck revisit
decisions.rationale: Same-deck flicker was causing the downstream searchKey to collapse to identical pre- and post-flicker values. React's Object.is dep check then suppressed the search effect re-fire, leaving card-search-store stuck at status:'idle' with results:[] even though 2 /cards/search requests had successfully been made and aborted

decisions.decision: Ref-keyed dedupe (lastFiredSearchKeyRef) in CardSearchSection mirroring DUP-4's CommanderSearch pattern
decisions.rationale: StrictMode double-invokes mount effects — only exposed when store already has primary at mount time (i.e. revisit path). Reload/first-open is absorbed by null-debouncedKey early-return. Ref-based dedupe preserves StrictMode's bug-surfacing value while no-oping identical re-invocations

next_action: Decide: (a) BOOK-1 + FU-3 housekeeping sweep, or (b) drop into Phase 3 (Deck Building & Card Display) via /gsd-discuss-phase 3. Phase 3 requirements: BUILD-01..08, DECK-09, UI-02, UI-04.
context_notes: User-reported bug: deck → change commander → back → re-click same deck leaves card-search section empty with what looked like 2 'commander browse' queries. The 'browse' queries were misread — they were the color-identity card-search (id<=wubg+f:commander, both look commander-ish because of f:commander). Real root cause: a silent race where reset() during loadForDeck's null-flicker destroyed the one successful search, and the post-flicker searchKey was primitive-equal to the pre-flicker key so the effect never re-fired. Fix proves out under both regression tests. Phase 02.3 still CLOSED — these are further post-phase polish commits. Context pressure at 83% when pausing.
